variants.title: HiFi Filter OS 5085 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 57820
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OS 5085 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 57820. Easy to install and replace, the OS 5085 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
